# Changelog

Argus publishes release notes on GitHub. This page mirrors every published, non-draft release from newest to oldest.

## Argus v0.1.21

Published July 10, 2026. [Open release](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/releases/tag/argus-v0.1.21).

### Changes

- Read MDM managed settings as the highest-precedence config source ([#258](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/258))
- Add settings reference documentation ([#260](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/260))
- Bump version to 0.1.21 ([#265](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/265))

[Full changelog on GitHub](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/compare/argus-v0.1.20...argus-v0.1.21).

## Argus v0.1.20

Published July 10, 2026. [Open release](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/releases/tag/argus-v0.1.20).

### Changes

- Refresh About dialog: Argus wordmark, updated copy, MIT License ([#233](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/233))
- Add full-text conversation/task search + file-usage search to /sessions ([#238](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/238))
- Clean up banner, Makefile, and Sessions filters ([#239](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/239))
- Automate release changelog publishing ([#240](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/240))
- Start desktop app at login by default ([#241](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/241))
- Session Interpretation 2.0 (\#234) ([#237](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/237))
- Temporarily disable the desktop start-at-login entirely ([#244](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/244))
- Overhaul the sessions view and global filter bar ([#245](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/245))
- Labels: data model + storage for sessions and tasks (Phase 1) ([#242](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/242))
- Labels: HTTP API + web UI for sessions and tasks (Phase 2) ([#243](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/243))
- Bring back sessions labels filter and label catalog management ([#246](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/246))
- Add hidden sessions ([#249](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/249))
- Add PostHog analytics to the docs site ([#250](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/250))
- Add bulk selection: multi-select, bulk label, and bulk hide for sessions ([#252](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/252))
- Retire the @agentdeploymentco/argus-schema dependency ([#259](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/259))
- Desktop silent mode: hide the tray, suppress first-run auto-open, silence notifications ([#256](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/256))
- new ADC signing identity ([#262](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/262))
- Task/interaction-centric session detail UI (\#124) ([#263](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/263))
- Bump version to 0.1.20 ([#264](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/264))

[Full changelog on GitHub](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/compare/argus-v0.1.19...argus-v0.1.20).

## Argus v0.1.19

Published July 6, 2026. [Open release](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/releases/tag/argus-v0.1.19).

### Changes

- Update README and CONTRIBUTING for current architecture; reframe README around the docs site ([#220](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/220))
- Sandbox claude-cli exec to an allowlist so CLT stubs never pop the install dialog ([#225](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/225))
- First-run intro screen ([#224](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/224))
- Surface the CLI's own error on a failed connection test, and log the test ([#213](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/213))
- Fix the cold-first-launch dashboard-open race ("Safari Can't Open the page") ([#227](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/227))
- Bump version to 0.1.19 ([#228](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/228))

[Full changelog on GitHub](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/compare/argus-v0.1.18...argus-v0.1.19).

## Argus v0.1.18

Published July 2, 2026. [Open release](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/releases/tag/argus-v0.1.18).

### Changes

- Read git identity from .gitconfig instead of shelling out to git ([#210](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/210))
- Deny claude-cli sandbox from exec'ing /usr/bin/git ([#211](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/211))
- Expose log level in Settings (\#204) ([#209](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/209))
- chore: bump version to 0.1.18 ([#212](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/212))

[Full changelog on GitHub](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/compare/argus-v0.1.17...argus-v0.1.18).

## Argus v0.1.17

Published July 2, 2026. [Open release](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/releases/tag/argus-v0.1.17).

### Changes

- Build web app before serving ([#190](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/190))
- Add auto-update toggle to General settings; show log file path in Debug ([#193](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/193))
- Add Argus Hub docs page ([#192](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/192))
- Reproducible demo-data script (synthetic argus.db for demos and docs) ([#199](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/199))
- Public docs refactor for a GTM audience ([#200](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/200))
- Desktop app: stable front-door port + graceful reconnect ([#202](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/202))
- Sandbox the claude-cli provider on macOS with sandbox-exec ([#206](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/206))
- Bump version to 0.1.17 ([#207](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/207))

[Full changelog on GitHub](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/compare/argus-v0.1.16...argus-v0.1.17).

## Argus v0.1.16

Published June 30, 2026. [Open release](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/releases/tag/argus-v0.1.16).

### Changes

- Docs: Mermaid diagrams, authoring guides, and release-triggered deploy ([#171](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/171))
- Settings screen in the web app (\#154) ([#172](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/172))
- Give Argus its own branding (icon + logo) ([#173](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/173))
- Default task extraction to enabled ([#178](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/178))
- Add unified timestamped logging ([#180](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/180))
- Fix tray reporting "sync off" while the CLI uploads ([#183](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/183))
- Add MIT license ([#167](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/167))
- Stop task extraction from opening local paths ([#186](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/186))
- Limit CLI banner to run command ([#187](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/187))
- Lower indexing watch interval ([#189](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/189))
- Bump version to 0.1.16 ([#188](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/pull/188))

[Full changelog on GitHub](https://github.com/Agent-Deployment-Co/argus/compare/argus-v0.1.15...argus-v0.1.16).
